title: tragacantha campestris
intro: Tragacantha campestris, also known as common hair sedge or lesser spear grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. Tragacantha campestris has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Tragacantha campestris is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
